parameters.arg3: CASE WHEN sum(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC NULLS FIRST) = 1 THEN business_date_string__find_business_date_lkp_1 ELSE cast(null as STRING) END
parameters.arg4: substring(CASE WHEN sum(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC NULLS FIRST) = 1 THEN business_date_string__find_business_date_lkp_1 ELSE cast(null as STRING) END, 1, 8)

fileTabs.content: SELECT /*+ parallel(REP) parallel(A) use_hash(REP A) */ 	REP.ACCOUNT_NO, 	REP.TRAN_CODE, 	REP.TRAN_AMOUNT,         REP.TRAN_DESC, 	REP.TRAN_DATE, 	REP.TRAN_REF_NO,         REP.PLAN_NUMBER, 	AA.ACCID FROM  	REP_INT_FREE_TRANS_STAGING REP, ACCOUNT_ALIAS AA WHERE 	AA.ETO IS NULL AND	AA.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = 'G' AND	REP.ACCOUNT_NO = AA.ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID AND	REP.TRANSFER_INDICATOR IS NULL UNION SELECT /*+ parallel(REP) parallel(A) use_hash(REP A) */ 	REP.ACCOUNT_NO, 	REP.TRAN_CODE, 	REP.TRAN_AMOUNT,         REP.TRAN_DESC, 	REP.TRAN_DATE, 	REP.TRAN_REF_NO,         REP.PLAN_NUMBER, 	AA.ACCID FROM  	REP_INT_FREE_TRANS_STAGING REP, ACCOUNT_TRANSFER_HISTORY AA WHERE 	REP.ACCOUNT_NO = AA.CURR_ACCOUNT_ALIAS_ID AND	REP.TRANSFER_INDICATOR = 'N'

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN CAST(((CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) = 1) THEN BUSINESS_DATE_STRING__FIND_BUSINESS_DATE_LKP_1 ELSE CAST(NULL AS STRING) END) IS NULL) AS BOOL) THEN (ERROR('No Business Date found on dbattribute')) ELSE (PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%Y%m%d', CAST(SUBSTRING((CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) = 1) THEN BUSINESS_DATE_STRING__FIND_BUSINESS_DATE_LKP_1 ELSE CAST(NULL AS STRING) END) , 0 , 8) AS STRING))) END)
(CASE WHEN ((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 RANGE BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) = 1) THEN output_sp ELSE NULL END)
